title: Decision title in sentence case
context: Describe the context and problem statement that motivated this decision. What forces are at play? What constraints exist? What options were considered and rejected?
decision: Describe the decision that was made and its full rationale. What is the change? Why was this option chosen over the alternatives? Include enough detail that someone can understand the decision without reading the full discussion.
consequences: Describe the consequences of this decision — what becomes easier, harder, or different as a result. Include both positive consequences (improvements, simplifications) and negative consequences (new constraints, migration costs, added complexity).
